title: [codereview-3] spec/02-physical-link.md: CCP-16 section placement under PHY (should be routing or dedicated appendix?), implementation details in spec (norm formulas), missing updates to other docs/links/index, no explicit conformance requirements
description: Third codereview pass. The load balancing content fits better in 05-routing.md or new appendix-ccp.md as it spans routing/signaling. Formulas in main spec risk becoming outdated vs impls. No MUST for all nodes vs gateways. No update to spec/README.md or cross-links in 01-architecture.md. Bead tagged codereview, discovered-from:project-LICHEN-da2q.16.5. All prior findings from passes 1-2 addressed.
close_reason: All findings fixed in spec/02-physical-link.md CCP-16 section. Three codereview passes completed with fixes applied after each. Main bead awaits 3 clean passes confirmation.
